specific_question: How many EV units did Elexion sell in Canada during 2024?
answer: Elexion sold 1,990 units in Canada in 2024.
justification: Sales volume figures do not contribute to the documentation and tracking protocols.
dr_question: How should Elexion Automotive update its compliance documentation framework by 2026 to verify and record supply-chain investment credits under Canada’s revised ZEV mandate?
